info.title: Banxe EMI REST API
info.description: FCA-authorised EMI platform — payment, KYC, customer, ledger

get.description: Returns 200 if the API process is running.

Checks downstream service connectivity.
Returns 200 if all critical dependencies are reachable.

post.summary: Authenticate and obtain a JWT Bearer token
Refresh access token using refresh token
post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token + rotated refresh token. PSD2 RTS: re-authentication required after 5 min inactivity or 15 min maximum. Refresh tokens are rotated on every use (rotation prevents replay).

Create a new Individual or Corporate customer.
Starts in ONBOARDING lifecycle state.
FCA MLR 2017: KYC workflow must be started before ACTIVE state.

Side-effect: writes a minimal record to the persistent DB so the
auth endpoint can find this customer by email across restarts.

Transition customer lifecycle (e.g. ONBOARDING → ACTIVE, ACTIVE → SUSPENDED).
Requires operator_id for FCA audit trail (I-24).

Initiates KYC (individual) or KYB (corporate) verification.
FCA MLR 2017 Reg.28: CDD before establishing business relationship.

MLRO approves EDD. Only valid when workflow status is EDD_REQUIRED or MLRO_REVIEW.
FCA MLR 2017 Reg.33: enhanced due diligence for high-risk customers.

get.description: Returns all payments in the in-memory sandbox. Not available in production.

schema.title: Response List Payments V1 Payments Get

post.description:
Submit a payment instruction.

- FPS: UK domestic GBP, near-instant (< 2 hours)
- SEPA_CT: EUR cross-border, D+1
- SEPA_INSTANT: EUR instant (< 10 seconds, 24/7)

Idempotency: re-sending the same idempotency_key returns the original result.
Amounts must be decimal strings (e.g. "100.00") — never float.

get.description:
Returns all ledger accounts for the organisation.
In production: fetches from Midaz CBS.
FCA CASS 15: safeguarding accounts must be identifiable.

Returns real-time balance for the specified account.
FCA CASS 7.15.17R: balance data must be current (not stale).
Amounts returned as decimal strings (I-05, never float).

post.description:
Directly dispatch a notification to a customer or recipient.
Operator-only endpoint — requires at least one recipient field.
FCA COBS 2.2: content derived from approved templates.

get.description:
Render a notification template with sample variables.
Useful for compliance review (FCA COBS 2.2 approval workflow).

post.summary: Assess transaction — Fraud + AML pre-payment gate
post.description:
Run fraud scoring and AML monitoring for a payment before rail submission.

Returns APPROVE / HOLD / BLOCK decision with full fraud and AML findings.
Callers MUST check `decision` before submitting to payment rail.

After successful rail submission, call the velocity record endpoint
(or `TxMonitorService.record()`) to update the AML velocity state.

Classify customer vulnerability and trigger support actions.
FCA FG21/1: firms must take practical action, not just record flags.

get.description: Retrieve the latest vulnerability assessment for a customer.

put.description:
Update customer vulnerability flag — always returns HITL proposal (I-27).

FCA FG21/1 §2.8: Vulnerability classification changes require human oversight.

schema.title: Response Update Vulnerability Flag V1 Consumer Duty Vulnerability  Customer Id  Put

post.description:
Assess whether product fees represent fair value vs. UK EMI benchmarks.
Results must be reviewed by the board at least annually (PS22/9 §6.6).

post.summary: Assess PS22/9 outcome area for customer
post.description:
Assess a Consumer Duty outcome area for a customer.

PS22/9: Firms must monitor and evidence good outcomes.
Score < threshold → FAILED status.

schema.title: Response Assess Outcome V1 Consumer Duty Outcomes Post

post.description:
Generate Consumer Duty monitoring report for FCA board review.
PS22/9 §10.12: board must review at least annually.

get.description:
List HITL review cases. Filter by status (PENDING / APPROVED / REJECTED /
ESCALATED / EXPIRED). Omit status to return all cases.
SAR cases are sorted first (4h SLA).

post.description:
Manually enqueue a transaction for HITL review.
Normally called automatically by the payment service when
FraudAMLPipeline returns decision=HOLD. Available for direct use.

post.summary: Record operator decision on a HITL case
post.description:
Record a human decision: APPROVE / REJECT / ESCALATE.

APPROVE: payment proceeds to rail submission.
REJECT:  payment is rejected — customer notified.
ESCALATE: case forwarded to MLRO for senior review.

Decision is written to feedback corpus (I-27: supervised feedback loop).

get.description:
Queue performance metrics: pending count, approval rate,
avg resolution time, oldest pending case (SLA pressure).
Used for FCA Consumer Duty monitoring (EU AI Act Art.14).

post.description:
Generate a FIN060 PDF for the given reporting period.
The amounts supplied in the request body override the ClickHouse query
when the stub generator is active (production: fetched from ClickHouse).

Generate + submit FIN060 to FCA RegData in one call.
STATUS: RegData submission is STUBBED until FCA_REGDATA_API_KEY is provisioned (CEO action).

post.summary: File a Suspicious Activity Report (POCA 2002 s.330)
post.description:
Create a DRAFT SAR pending MLRO review.
POCA 2002 s.330: must be filed when ML is known or suspected.
The SAR cannot be submitted to NCA until MLRO approves it.

get.description:
List all SARs, optionally filtered by status.
GDPR: restricted to MLRO and compliance roles (enforced at auth layer).
Aggregated SAR metrics: counts by status + submission rate.

post.summary: MLRO approves SAR for NCA submission (POCA 2002 s.330)
post.description:
MLRO gate: approve a DRAFT SAR for NCA submission.
Only DRAFT SARs can be approved. Decision is logged for FCA audit (5-year retention).

post.summary: Submit MLRO-approved SAR to NCA SAROnline
post.description:
Submit an MLRO-approved SAR to NCA SAROnline.
Requires status=MLRO_APPROVED — POCA 2002 s.330 MLRO gate is mandatory.
STATUS: NCA SAROnline is STUBBED until NCA credentials are provisioned.

MLRO concludes transaction is not suspicious — SAR withdrawn.
Withdrawal reason is mandatory (JMLSG guidance §6.7).
Can only withdraw DRAFT or MLRO_APPROVED SARs.

get.description: Returns account statement as JSON for the requested period. FCA PS7/24: available on customer request. All amounts are Decimal strings (never float).
Returns account statement as a downloadable CSV file. FCA PS7/24: client statement on request. Suitable for mobile save-to-files and spreadsheet import.

post.summary: Receive Watchman list-update webhook (AML sanctions screening)
post.description:
Inbound webhook from Moov Watchman (via Banxe Screener).
Validates shared secret, logs event (I-24), triggers n8n workflow.

Watchman sends this on:
- list_updated: OFAC/HMT/EU/UN list refresh
- search_notification: async search result available
- health: liveness ping from Watchman admin

MLRO and Head of Financial Crime are notified via n8n → /internal/notifications/mlro.

post.summary: Send AML alert to MLRO / Head of Financial Crime (internal)
post.description:
Internal endpoint for AML/sanctions events requiring MLRO attention.
Called by n8n workflows (watchman_list_update, watchman_rescreen_high_risk)
and by banxe_aml_orchestrator glue layer.

Security: X-Internal-Token validated against INTERNAL_API_TOKEN env var.
Audit: every notification logged with unique ID (I-24).

post.summary: Enqueue high-risk sanctions re-screen (triggered after Watchman list update)
post.description:
Enqueues a batch re-screen of high-risk / PEP-potential customers.

Worker picks up from banxe:sanctions:rescreen:high_risk Redis list,
calls sanctions_check_core / yente_adapter_agent per customer,
and routes any new hits through HITL gates (OrgRoleChecker).

Security: X-Internal-Token required (internal service-to-service only).

get.description: Liveness check for the compliance KB service.

List all compliance notebooks.

Optional filters:
- tags: filter by one or more tags (e.g. ?tags=aml&tags=uk)
- jurisdiction: filter by jurisdiction (eu | uk | fatf | eba | esma)

schema.title: Response List Notebooks V1 Kb Notebooks Get

get.description: Return full notebook metadata including source list and doc count.

post.description:
Ask a compliance question against a notebook.

Returns an answer synthesised from retrieved chunks, with citations
showing source document, section, and snippet.

Context fields (optional):
- jurisdiction: "uk" | "eu" | "fatf"
- risk_level: "low" | "medium" | "high"
- product_type: "emi" | "bank" | "crypto"

Semantic similarity search over a compliance notebook.

Returns raw chunks with similarity scores (higher is more relevant).
Use this for exploratory search; use /query for synthesised answers.

schema.title: Response Search Kb V1 Kb Search Post

post.description:
Compare two versions of a regulatory document.

Returns a structured diff showing added, removed, and modified sections
with impact tags (e.g. 'new-requirement', 'modified-requirement').

Both versions must be ingested into the KB before comparison.

get.description:
Return citation details for a specific source document.

Searches the specified notebook for the source and returns its
metadata including title, version, URL, and a representative snippet.

post.description:
Ingest a document into a compliance notebook.

Accepts:
- content: raw text string
- file_path: path to PDF (.pdf), Markdown (.md), or text (.txt) file

The document is chunked, embedded, and stored in the notebook's
ChromaDB collection. Existing chunks for the same document_id are
replaced on next ingest (delete + re-add pattern).

Design a new compliance experiment from KB query.

Queries the compliance KB, extracts citations, and creates a DRAFT
experiment with auto-generated hypothesis and metrics baseline/target.

Returns the created experiment in DRAFT status.

get.description:
List experiments, optionally filtered by status.

Returns summary objects (id, title, scope, status, updated_at).

schema.title: Response List Experiments V1 Experiments Get

get.description:
Get current AML metrics snapshot from ClickHouse.

Returns hit rate, false positive rate, SAR yield, review time,
amount blocked (GBP), and cases reviewed for the given period.

schema.title: Response Get Current Metrics V1 Experiments Metrics Current Get

get.description: Get full experiment details by ID.

patch.description:
Approve a DRAFT experiment → moves to ACTIVE.

Validates hypothesis length, KB citations, metrics baseline/target.
Raises 404 if not found, 422 if validation fails.

Reject a DRAFT experiment → moves to REJECTED.

Requires a reason. Raises 404 if not found, 400 if not in DRAFT status.

post.description:
Propose a compliance change for an ACTIVE experiment.

Creates a Git branch, renders a PR body with HITL checklist,
and opens a GitHub PR + tracking issue.

Use dry_run=true (default) to preview without creating branch/PR.

get.description:
Get the full audit trail for an experiment.

Returns all audit entries logged for this experiment ID.
FCA requirement: 7-year retention.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Trail V1 Experiments  Experiment Id  Audit Get

get.description: Health check for transaction monitor service.

schema.title: Response Health V1 Monitor Health Get

post.description:
Score a transaction event and generate/route an AML alert.

Returns the risk score and the generated alert (if any).
CRITICAL and HIGH alerts are automatically routed to Marble.
LOW alerts are auto-closed with audit log.

schema.title: Response Score Transaction V1 Monitor Score Post

get.description: List AML alerts with optional filters.

schema.title: Response List Alerts V1 Monitor Alerts Get

get.description: Get full alert details including explanation and KB citations.

patch.description:
Update alert status (reviewing / escalated / closed).

HITL invariant: CRITICAL alerts require human sign-off before closure.

get.description: Get velocity metrics for a customer across all time windows.

schema.title: Response Get Velocity V1 Monitor Velocity  Customer Id  Get

get.description:
Get aggregate monitoring metrics for dashboard.

Returns alert counts by severity, open/closed breakdown,
and estimated SAR yield.

schema.title: Response Get Metrics V1 Monitor Metrics Get

post.description:
Backtest scoring rules on historical data.

Generates synthetic transactions for the specified period
and returns estimated hit rate and SAR yield improvement.

get.description: Returns current client funds vs safeguarded balance. CASS 7.15.17R.
Lists all designated safeguarding accounts (CASS 7.13).

schema.title: Response List Safeguarding Accounts V1 Safeguarding Accounts Get

get.description: Returns all safeguarding breach events (CASS 7.15.29R).

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days of history to return
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of days of history to return

parameters.name: severity

schema.description: Filter by severity: MINOR | MAJOR | CRITICAL
schema.title: Severity

parameters.description: Filter by severity: MINOR | MAJOR | CRITICAL

schema.title: Response List Breaches V1 Safeguarding Breaches Get

post.description: Runs CASS 7.15.17R daily reconciliation and records result to audit trail. In sandbox: uses stub balances and dry_run=True.

get.description: Generates a resolution pack — all data needed to distribute client funds within 48h (CASS 15.12). Required for FCA authorisation.

post.description: Generates FIN060 monthly return (CASS 15.12.4R).

get.description: Returns the tri-party reconciliation status for today (or a given date). CASS 7.15.17R daily reconciliation obligation.
Returns a full three-leg reconciliation report for a given date. Includes per-leg diff, tolerance, and escalation notes.
Returns reconciliation status for the last N days. Sandbox: all entries are MATCHED with stub balances.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of past days to include (max 90)
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of past days to include (max 90)

post.description:
Create a support ticket, auto-route it, attempt FAQ auto-resolution,
and check if it constitutes a formal DISP complaint.

FCA DISP 1.3: tickets are SLA-stamped at creation time.
FCA DISP 1.1: formal complaints are auto-detected and escalated.

get.description: List open support tickets. Optionally filter by customer_id.

schema.title: Response List Tickets V1 Support Tickets Get

get.description: Retrieve a single support ticket by ID.

post.description:
Mark a ticket as resolved and optionally record CSAT score.

FCA DISP 1.3: resolution must be documented.
PS22/9 §10: CSAT score feeds Consumer Duty outcome monitoring.

get.description:
Aggregate CSAT and NPS metrics for Consumer Duty outcome testing.

FCA PS22/9 §10: firms must monitor customer outcomes systematically.

post.description: Generate and validate a regulatory report. Does NOT submit (L4 gate).

Submit a validated report to the regulator.

I-27: L4 — caller asserts that human approval has been obtained.

get.description: Query regulatory audit trail (SYSC 9 records).

schema.title: Response Get Audit Log V1 Regulatory Reports Audit Get

post.description: Schedule a recurring regulatory report via n8n.

schema.title: Response List Schedules V1 Regulatory Schedules  Entity Id  Get

get.description: List all supported regulatory report templates with SLA days.

schema.title: Response List Templates V1 Regulatory Templates Get

post.description: Request a live FX quote. Returns 400 if currency is sanctioned.

schema.title: Response Request Quote V1 Fx Quote Post

post.description:
Execute an FX order from a valid quote.

Returns:
  200 — execution dict
  202 — HITL_REQUIRED (amount >= £50k, requires Compliance Officer approval)
  400 — blocked or validation error
  404 — quote not found

schema.title: Response Execute Fx V1 Fx Execute Post

get.description:
List all available FX rates.

Staleness checked (max 60s). Decimal bid/ask/mid (I-22).

schema.title: Response List Rates V1 Fx Rates Get

get.description: Placeholder — use POST /v1/fx/rates/refresh to trigger refresh.

schema.title: Response Get Refresh Placeholder V1 Fx Rates Refresh Get

post.description: Trigger a rate refresh for all supported pairs (operator endpoint).

schema.title: Response Refresh Rates V1 Fx Rates Refresh Post

schema.title: Response Get Single Rate V1 Fx Rates  From Currency   To Currency  Get

schema.title: Response List Spreads V1 Fx Spreads Get

schema.title: Response Get Single Spread V1 Fx Spreads  From Currency   To Currency  Get

post.description:
Create a new multi-currency account for an entity.

- Validates all currencies are supported (GBP, EUR, USD, CHF, PLN, CZK, SEK, NOK, DKK, HUF).
- Hard limit: max 10 currencies per account.
- Returns account_id, entity_id, base_currency, currencies, created_at.

schema.title: Response Create Multi Currency Account V1 Mc Accounts Create Post

get.description: Return all currency balances as {currency: str(amount)} (I-05).

schema.title: Response Get Account Balances V1 Mc Accounts  Account Id  Balances Get

get.description: Return list of currency codes held in a multi-currency account.

schema.title: Response List Account Currencies V1 Mc Accounts  Account Id  Currencies Get

post.description:
Debit from_currency, credit to_currency, record conversion at given rate.

- amount and rate are Decimal strings (I-05).
- Fee = 0.2% of from_amount.
- Returns conversion record with fee, status, timestamps.

schema.title: Response Convert Currency V1 Mc Accounts  Account Id  Convert Post

post.description:
Return consolidated balance in base currency + per-currency breakdown.

- rates: dict of {currency: rate-to-base} as strings.
- consolidated_balance: sum of all balances converted to base_currency.

schema.title: Response Get Currency Report V1 Mc Accounts  Account Id  Currency Report Post

get.description: Return all nostro/vostro/loro correspondent banking accounts.

schema.title: Response List Nostros V1 Nostro Get

get.description: Return details for a single nostro account.

schema.title: Response Get Nostro V1 Nostro  Nostro Id  Get

post.description:
Compare our nostro balance vs correspondent bank's reported balance.

- Tolerance: £1.00 (broader than internal 1p due to settlement timing).
- MATCHED if abs(variance) <= 1.00, else DISCREPANCY.
- their_balance is a Decimal string (I-05).

schema.title: Response Reconcile Nostro V1 Nostro  Nostro Id  Reconcile Post

Returns {"raw_key": str, "key_id": str, "tier": str}.

TPP must be REGISTERED in the registry.

delete.description:
Revoke a consent — returns HITL proposal (irreversible, I-27).

I-27: Revocation is irreversible — requires COMPLIANCE_OFFICER approval.
PSD2 Art.66: Customer may withdraw consent at any time.

schema.title: Response Revoke Consent V1 Consent Grants  Consent Id  Delete

post.description:
Validate consent is active, not expired, and covers required scope.

PSD2 Art.67: AISP must not access data beyond consent scope.

Initiate PISP payment — always returns HITL proposal (I-27).

I-27: Payment initiation is always L4 HITL.

post.description:

PSD2 Art.65: Customer must explicitly approve or decline AISP access.

post.summary: Create transaction (I-27 HITL L4 for amounts >= £10k)
Update fraud rules (I-27 HITL L4 — FRAUD_ANALYST required)
Match device fingerprint (I-27 HITL for suspicious)

Submit case to FOS (I-27 HITL L4 -- dual sign-off required)
Generate HMRC annual report (I-27 HITL L4)

post.summary: Correct statement (I-27 HITL L4 -- OPERATIONS_OFFICER required)

kb_citations.description: Citation IDs from the Compliance KB (Part 1)

CreateQuoteRequest.description: Request model for FX quote creation.

DecideRequest.description: Operator decision on a HOLD case.

query.title: Query
query.description: KB query, e.g. 'velocity limits for P2P EMI'

EnqueueCaseRequest.title: EnqueueCaseRequest
EnqueueCaseRequest.description: Manually enqueue a HOLD case (used when calling outside pipeline).

ExecuteQuoteRequest.title: ExecuteQuoteRequest
ExecuteQuoteRequest.description: Request model for FX quote execution.

ExperimentSummary.description: Lightweight experiment summary for list views.

FIN060GenerateRequest.title: FIN060GenerateRequest
FIN060GenerateRequest.description: Generate FIN060 PDF for a reporting period.

FairValueVerdict.title: FairValueVerdict
FairValueVerdict.description:
Result of the FCA COBS 6 fair value assessment.

FAIR:             Price is proportionate to overall benefits.
REVIEW_REQUIRED:  Price marginally above benchmark — board review needed.
UNFAIR:           Price significantly exceeds value delivered — action required.

FileSARRequest.title: FileSARRequest
FileSARRequest.description: Create a draft SAR for MLRO review.

FraudAssessRequest.title: FraudAssessRequest
FraudAssessRequest.description:
Request to assess a transaction through Fraud + AML pipeline.
All fields reflect the payment intent before rail submission.

FraudAssessResponse.title: FraudAssessResponse
FraudAssessResponse.description:
Combined Fraud + AML decision for a transaction.
Decision field drives payment flow:
  APPROVE → proceed to rail submission
  HOLD    → queue for HITL review (do NOT submit)
  BLOCK   → reject immediately (do NOT submit)

HITLChecklist.title: HITLChecklist
HITLChecklist.description: Human-in-the-loop approval checklist for every compliance change PR.

HoldRequest.title: HoldRequest
HoldRequest.description: Request to hold a SWIFT message.

refresh_token.title: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token — valid for 7 days. Pass to POST /v1/auth/token/refresh.

MLRODecisionRequest.title: MLRODecisionRequest
MLRODecisionRequest.description: MLRO approval or withdrawal of a SAR.

MT103Request.title: MT103Request
MT103Request.description: Request model for MT103 Customer Credit Transfer.

MT202Request.title: MT202Request
MT202Request.description: Request model for MT202 Financial Institution Transfer.

OutcomeRating.title: OutcomeRating
OutcomeRating.description: Outcome quality rating for a customer interaction.

experiment_id.title: Experiment Id
experiment_id.description: Experiment ID — optional when passed as URL path parameter

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If True, generate PR body but do not create branch/PR

ProposeRequest.description: Request to create a PR for an experiment.

RecordOutcomeRequest.description: Record a Consumer Duty outcome observation for a customer interaction.

RecordProductRequest.description: Request to record product governance assessment.

RejectQuoteRequest.description: Request model for FX quote rejection.

resolution_deadline_hours.title: Resolution Deadline Hours
resolution_deadline_hours.description: CASS 15: resolution pack must be executable within 48h

ReviewReason.title: ReviewReason
ReviewReason.description: Why this case was held for human review.

RiskFactor.title: RiskFactor
RiskFactor.description:
Single risk factor contributing to overall score.

weight, value, contribution are non-monetary floats (rates/scores).

RiskScore.title: RiskScore
RiskScore.description:
Composite risk score with factor breakdown.

score is a non-monetary float 0–1 (I-01 does not apply to rates).

SARReason.title: SARReason
SARReason.description: Grounds for SAR filing (POCA 2002 s.330 + JMLSG guidance).

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Transaction amount as decimal string (PSD2 RTS Art.10 dynamic linking)

payee.title: Payee
payee.description: Payee name (PSD2 RTS Art.10 dynamic linking)

message.title: Message
message.default: SCA challenge created. Complete authentication within the time limit.

preferred.title: Preferred
preferred.description: Recommended SCA method for this customer

message.title: Message
message.default: SCA challenge resent. A new code has been sent to your device.

sca_token.title: Sca Token
sca_token.description: PSD2 RTS Art.10 JWT token (only if verified=True). Include in payment Authorization header.

attempts_remaining.title: Attempts Remaining
attempts_remaining.description: Remaining verification attempts before challenge locks

entity_ids.title: Entity Ids
entity_ids.description: List of entity IDs to notify

actor.title: Actor
actor.description: System or user initiating the notification

StatementResponse.title: StatementResponse
StatementResponse.description:
Account statement JSON response.
All monetary amounts are Decimal strings (I-05 — never float).
FCA PS7/24: client statement on request.

TransactionEvent.title: TransactionEvent
TransactionEvent.description:
Parsed transaction event for AML risk scoring.

All monetary values use Decimal (I-01).
Jurisdiction codes are ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

TransactionLineResponse.title: TransactionLineResponse
TransactionLineResponse.description: Single transaction line in a statement — mobile-safe field set.

VulnerabilityAssessRequest.title: VulnerabilityAssessRequest
VulnerabilityAssessRequest.description: Flag a customer's vulnerability and trigger support actions.

WithdrawSARRequest.title: WithdrawSARRequest
WithdrawSARRequest.description: MLRO withdrawal of a SAR with mandatory reason.

api__models__consumer_duty__GenerateRepo.description: Parameters for Consumer Duty board report generation.

api__models__notifications__SendNotifica.description: Direct send (internal API — operator use only).

actor.title: Actor
actor.description: System or user initiating the notification

opt_in.title: Opt In
opt_in.description: True to opt in, False to opt out

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If true, write to audit but do not notify FCA

services__consumer_duty__consumer_duty_p.title: VulnerabilityFlag
services__consumer_duty__consumer_duty_p.description:
Specific vulnerability signals observed for a customer.
Mapped to VulnerabilityCategory in ConsumerDutyService.

GDPR note: DOMESTIC_ABUSE is special-category data — must be handled
with extra care and appropriate access controls (Art.9 GDPR).
